title: BLOSTM Plastic Pipe Cutter - Heavy Duty Ratchet Pipe Cutters with 42mm Outside Diameter Cutting Capacity for PVC PEX PPR Plastic Pipes & Rubber Hoses, Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle & Safety Lock (Red)
features: PROFESSIONAL GRADE - Our indispensable ratchet pipe cutters offer up to 42mm outside diameter cutting capacity. It’s ideal for cutting plastic, PVC, PPR, CPVC, rubber, PEX, and PP hoses and pipes.

WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS - Whether you’re a plumber, electrician, maintenance worker, handyman, or vehicle mechanic, this pipe cutter is a must-have for construction, building, and engineering tasks.
HIGH-QUALITY CRAFTSMANSHIP - Each plastic pipe cutter is made of SK-5 high-carbon steel with PTFE treatment for the toughest cuts and lasting sharpness.
ERGONOMIC DESIGN - Save your physical strength and make work easier with our one-stroke cut spring handle. Plus, this pvc pipe cutter also features a comfortable non-slip grip and safety lock.
RATCHET DRIVE TECHNOLOGY - Each spring-loaded plastic cutter is designed with a labour-saving ratchet power unit to reduce hand fatigue and provide a faster rebound time during projects.
description: BLOSTM Plastic Pipe Cutter - Heavy Duty Ratchet Pipe Cutters with 42mm Outside Diameter Cutting Capacity for PVC PEX PPR Plastic Pipes & Rubber Hoses, Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle & Safety Lock Are you looking for a reliable pipe cutter that can handle all kinds of material? Look no further than our ratchet type pipe cutter! Made of SK-5 high-carbon steel with PTFE treatment for the toughest cuts. This indispensable tool offers an impressive 42mm outside diameter cutting capacity, making it ideal for plastic, PVC, PPR, CPVC, rubber, PEX, and PP hoses and pipes. Whether you’re a plumber, electrician, maintenance worker, handyman, or vehicle mechanic, this plastic pipe cutter is a must-have for construction, building, and engineering tasks. The ergonomic design includes a comfortable non-slip grip and a safety lock, ensuring both efficiency and safety during use. Our spring-loaded pipe cutter incorporates labour-saving ratchet power, reducing hand fatigue and providing a faster rebound time. Whether you’re working on repairs, installations, or maintenance, trust BLOSTM – where precision meets practicality.
